name: AmazonPublisherServicesVerveAdapter
summary: APS Verve Adapter for integrating Amazon Publisher Services with Verve SDK
description:
The Amazon Publisher Services Verve Adapter enables publishers to use APS demand with Verve mediation.
This adapter allows you to integrate Amazon demand into your Verve waterfall.
Learn more at: https://aps.amazon.com/aps/solutions-for-mobile-app-developers/
